SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2025 VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (RICHARD DAVIS) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS RASHAN BROWN AND CATRICE ALICIA TONEY ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, RAHSAN TONEY, CATRICE ALICIA $8,658.44 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,658.44 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
